title: sabinea dubia
intro: Sabinea dubia, also known as the "Yellow Corkwood" or "Yellow Cork Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Sabinea dubia include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin infections and wounds. Sabinea dubia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
